title: Docs - able to change width

posts.author: Selena (Selena Cox)
posts.cookedHtml:
As they are digital, the docs don’t need to have such a structured width to them.

I think there is value to being able to have the default width, and then a wider width option.
(notion allows the narrow and then full-width options).
This would help as I currently use a two column structure to look at two teams workload in a weekly meeting, and it would be good to be able to still have the two columns, but have a wider page.

posts.author: monday_user (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very useful. We are embedding tables in our Docs for review in meetings and the narrow width results in multiple scroll bars to navigate in order to see content. A customizable width would resolve this issue.
